method: Bootstrap resampling: 30 iterations x 500-row samples, pred_contrib
interpretation: top_5_presence_rate = fraction of bootstraps where feature appears in global top-5

top1_stability.assessment: STABLE — dominant #1 feature in all 30 bootstraps

governance_conclusions: EXT_SOURCE_MEAN is #1 global driver in 30/30 bootstraps — unambiguous primary risk signal
Top-3 features (EXT_SOURCE_MEAN, CREDIT_TO_ANNUITY, CREDIT_TO_GOODS) show HIGH stability across resamples
Stable top-3 supports reproducible adverse action reason code selection
SHAP reason codes derived from these features are robust to sampling variation
